title: Weld Strength Calculator
description: Industrial-grade weld strength analysis per ISO 5817, AWS D1.1, and Lean Six Sigma principles. Calculates allowable load, safety margin, and process capability with data confidence adjustment.

inputs.label: Weld Type
inputs.businessContext: Determines the geometry factor and stress distribution model per AWS D1.1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Determines the geometry factor and stress distribution model per AWS D1.1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: AWS D1.1'e göre geometri faktörünü ve gerilme dağılım modelini belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bestimmt den Geometriefaktor und das Spannungsverteilungsmodell gemäß AWS D1.1.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Détermine le facteur géométrique et le modèle de distribution des contraintes selon AWS D1.1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Determina el factor geométrico y el modelo de distribución de tensiones según AWS D1.1.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يحدد عامل الهندسة ونموذج توزيع الإجهاد وفقًا لـ AWS D1.1.

inputs.label: Base Material Yield Strength
inputs.businessContext: Yield strength of the weaker base material (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).

label_i18n.fr: Limite d'élasticité du matériau de base

businessContext_i18n.en: Yield strength of the weaker base material (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zayıf temel malzemenin akma dayanımı (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).
businessContext_i18n.de: Streckgrenze des schwächeren Grundmaterials (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Limite d'élasticité du matériau de base le plus faible (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).
businessContext_i18n.es: Límite elástico del material base más débil (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مقاومة الخضوع للمادة الأساسية الأضعف (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).

inputs.label: Weld Material Tensile Strength
inputs.businessContext: Tensile strength of filler metal (e.g., ER70S-6).

label_i18n.fr: Résistance à la traction du métal d'apport
label_i18n.es: Resistencia a la tracción del material de aporte

businessContext_i18n.en: Tensile strength of filler metal (e.g., ER70S-6).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistance à la traction du métal d'apport (ex. ER70S-6).
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistencia a la tracción del metal de aporte (p. ej., ER70S-6).

inputs.label: Effective Throat Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Minimum throat dimension per ISO 5817 quality level B.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum throat dimension per ISO 5817 quality level B.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 5817 kalite seviyesi B'ye göre minimum boğaz boyutu.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dimension minimale de la gorge selon le niveau de qualité B de l'ISO 5817.
businessContext_i18n.es: Dimensión mínima de garganta según nivel de calidad B de ISO 5817.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأدنى لبعد الحلق وفقًا لمستوى الجودة B من ISO 5817.

inputs.label: Weld Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the weld seam.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of the weld seam.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur totale du cordon de soudure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud total del cordón de soldadura.

inputs.label: Applied Load
inputs.businessContext: Service load acting on the weld joint.

businessContext_i18n.en: Service load acting on the weld joint.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge de service agissant sur le joint soudé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga de servicio que actúa sobre la unión soldada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: حمل الخدمة المؤثر على وصلة اللحام.

inputs.label: Load Angle (from weld axis)
inputs.businessContext: Angle between applied load and weld longitudinal axis. 90° = transverse, 0° = longitudinal.

label_i18n.fr: Angle de charge (par rapport à l'axe de la soudure)
label_i18n.es: Ángulo de carga (desde el eje de la soldadura)

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle between applied load and weld longitudinal axis. 90° = transverse, 0° = longitudinal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygulanan yük ile kaynak boyuna ekseni arasındaki açı. 90° = enine, 0° = boyuna.
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel zwischen aufgebrachter Last und Schweißnahtlängsachse. 90° = quer, 0° = längs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle entre la charge appliquée et l'axe longitudinal de la soudure. 90° = transversal, 0° = longitudinal.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo entre la carga aplicada y el eje longitudinal de la soldadura. 90° = transversal, 0° = longitudinal.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الزاوية بين الحمل المطبق والمحور الطولي للحام. 90° = عرضي، 0° = طولي.

inputs.label: Quality Level (ISO 5817)
inputs.businessContext: ISO 5817 weld quality level: B=stringent, C=moderate, D=basic.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 5817 weld quality level: B=stringent, C=moderate, D=basic.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 5817 kaynak kalite seviyesi: B=sıkı, C=orta, D=temel.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schweißnahtqualitätsstufe nach ISO 5817: B=streng, C=mäßig, D=einfach.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de qualité de soudure ISO 5817 : B = strict, C = modéré, D = basique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de calidad de soldadura ISO 5817: B=exigente, C=moderado, D=básico.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مستوى جودة اللحام وفقًا لـ ISO 5817: B=صارم، C=معتدل، D=أساسي.

rules.message: Fillet weld throat thickness below 3 mm may cause inadequate fusion per ISO 5817.
Load angle must be between 0 and 180 degrees.
Base material yield strength exceeds weld tensile strength – risk of weld under-matching.

thresholds.message: Safety margin below 1.5 – review design per AWS D1.1 clause 2.4.
Safety margin below 1.0 – joint failure imminent under specified load.
Data confidence low – consider additional NDT or material testing.

hiddenLossDrivers: Inconsistent weld quality due to operator skill variation
Undetected porosity or lack of fusion reducing effective throat
suggestedActions: Implement real-time weld parameter monitoring with feedback control
Conduct periodic destructive testing to validate process capability
